changelog: Polish 12.3: new scripts/seed-data.php CLI seeds a fresh tenant DB with 20 realistic menu items from tests/fixtures/menu-sample.csv plus N test customers (default 5) and N random orders (default 10). Customers are upserted by email (seed{1..N}@cleanmenu-seed.test) so re-runs don't duplicate. Orders pick 1-3 random items, random delivery type, and a sprinkled status. --dry-run reports without writing. Useful for fresh-tenant demos, Lighthouse runs that need real data, and the KDS end-to-end smoke flow.
